problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Carbon. Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
